cadence: one new rung every week (put book) / month (call book)

regime.filter: enter only when SPY >= its 200-day average

put.label: Put credit spread (the strategy)
put.today_action: HOLD — 13 rungs open; next weekly rung next session

call.label: Bull call spread (max ROR/trade)
call.today_action: HOLD — 5 rungs open; next monthly rung the first session of next month

note: Pricing model v2: carry (historical T-bill), volatility skew, mean-reverting blended IV, 3% slippage — audited so the backtest pays real-world premiums. ~88-93% accurate, NOT 99%; concurrent rungs lose together in a crash (the at-risk cap bounds it).
